data.title: Cabot Properties acquires 220,608 sq ft modern logistics asset in Osaka, Japan (6,202 Tsubo) - 3-4-8 Shinmachi Nishi in Minoh City, Osaka.
data.description: Cabot Properties, a prominent investor, developer, and operator of logistics properties globally, has recently purchased a multi-story modern logistics warehouse in the Greater Osaka, Japan area. The acquired facility spans 220,608 square feet (equivalent to 6,202 Tsubo) and is located at 3-4-8 Shinmachi Nishi in Minoh City, Osaka. This acquisition marks Cabot's debut in Japan and aligns with their focus on investing in top-tier industrial assets.

data.title: Casago CEO Steve Schwab becomes Chairman of the Board, focusing on long-term strategy and franchise community. Schwab to remain CEO until October.
data.description: In Phoenix today, it was announced by Casago that CEO Steve Schwab will transition to a Founder and Chairman of the Board role, focusing on long-term strategy and industry advocacy within the expanding franchise community. Schwab will continue as CEO of Casago and Vacasa until October, when he will assume his new position. In collaboration with the Board of Directors, Schwab has outlined the plan for the transition.

data.title: Millicom (Tigo) to announce Q4 2025 results on Feb 26, 2026, hosting video conference for global financial community. Register to participate. Contact investor relations team for question submission. Join conference via specified numbers and Webinar ID.
data.description: Tigo, also known as Millicom and traded on NASDAQ as TIGO, will be releasing their Q4 2025 results on February 26, 2026. A video conference will accompany the release, scheduled for 08:00 (New York) / 14:00 (Luxembourg) / 13:00 (London) on the same day. To participate interactively, registration is mandatory via the provided link. Confirmations with conference details will be emailed post-registration. Those wishing to ask questions during the live event can notify the Investor Relations team at investors@millicom.com after the event begins. Alternatively, participants can join in listen-only mode by dialing a number and entering the Webinar ID: 869 1177 5553. For example, participants in the US can call +1 929 205 6099.

data.title: Wolters Kluwer introduces Medi-Span Expert AI to enhance medication intelligence for digital health, streamlining development timelines for AI developers.
data.description: In Waltham, Massachusetts, Wolters Kluwer Health has announced the launch of Medi-Span® Expert AI, which aims to provide medication intelligence from Medi-Span to digital health technology developers. Medi-Span, known for its reliability and widely used in the healthcare sector, is a prominent solution created by the makers of UpToDate®. The new offering includes an MCP server specifically for AI developers, with the goal of reducing customer development timelines and simplifying connectivity for third-party AI applications. This move is part of Wolters Kluwer Health's efforts to enhance the efficiency of medication decision-making in the industry.

data.title: Bessent urges Senate on Fed pick amid probe backlash against Powell, complicating Trump's choice of Warsh for chair.
data.description: The President's push to confirm Kevin M. Warsh as the next Federal Reserve chair faces obstacles due to a criminal investigation involving Jerome H. Powell.

data.title: Wendy's (NASDAQ: WEN) hits 52-week low after weak outlook. Q4 earnings beat estimates: EPS at 16 cents, revenue $543.0M. Global same-restaurant sales down. Added 34 net new restaurants in Q4. CEO cites challenges but sees progress in turnaround plan and international growth.
data.description: Wendy's reported fourth-quarter results with earnings exceeding estimates, reporting adjusted EPS of 16 cents compared to the estimated 14 cents, and total revenues of $543.0 million, surpassing the $535.990 million estimate. Diluted GAAP EPS stood at 14 cents, with a net income of $26.5 million and an adjusted EBITDA of $113.3 million. The global systemwide sales for the quarter were $3.4 billion, reflecting an 8.3% decrease, with U.S. same-restaurant sales dropping by 11.3% and international systemwide sales increasing by 6.2%. Overall, Wendy's added 157 net new restaurants for the full year, including 121 international locations. Interim CEO Ken Cook expressed confidence in the progress of their turnaround plan and growth in international markets.

data.title: NxGen Brands, Inc. (OTC: NXGB) extends CAND Candy Crew Token launch window through Presidents' Day Weekend for market optimization.
data.description: NxGen Brands, Inc. has decided to extend the launch window of the CAND Candy Crew Token through the Presidents’ Day weekend. This move aims to capitalize on favorable market conditions, with an emphasis on reaching optimal outcomes. This extension provides investors with an extended period to participate in the token launch.

data.title: Atomic Clock Market projected to reach USD 1,281.8 million by 2036 with 7.0% CAGR, up from USD 651.6 million in 2026.
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, on February 13, 2026, market research firm Future Market Insights (FMI) has reported that the Atomic Clock Market is valued at approximately USD 651.6 million in 2026. FMI predicts that the market will see significant growth, reaching an estimated USD 1,281.8 million by 2036, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.0%. The surge in the market is attributed to the increasing reliance on modern systems.

data.title: ACR appoints Michael Wessner to Board. Wessner, experienced in e-commerce and private equity, joins leadership team.
data.description: ACR, headquartered in Exton, Pennsylvania, shared on February 13, 2026, that Michael Wessner, a seasoned executive with extensive experience in distribution, e-commerce, and private equity, has recently joined their team. ACR is a prominent supplier of vital foodservice and operational supplies. This move is expected to bring in significant expertise and leadership to the company.

data.description: LHV Group has recently disclosed that between February 6th and 12th, 2026, it purchased a significant number of its own shares on the Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange.

data.description: A group of talented professionals showcase the company's dedication to quality and expansion into various sectors. data.title: Frontier Airlines, a subsidiary of Frontier Group Holdings, will participate in Barclays 43rd Annual Industrial Select Conference. CEO Jimmy Dempsey to attend.
data.description: Today, in Denver, Frontier Airlines, a branch of Frontier Group Holdings, declared that Jimmy Dempsey, the President and CEO, will join a moderated talk with Brandon Oglenski at the Barclays 43rd Annual Industrial event. (NASDAQ: ULCC)
